storyboard.content: I have a productive cough that has been getting worse over the past 10 days and I am coughing up yellowish-green mucus.
I am short of breath even when I am just sitting still and not doing anything.
My chest feels tight and heavy.
I have a fever of 101 degrees and I am so exhausted I cannot do my normal daily activities. I have completely lost my appetite.
This started 10 days ago and has been getting steadily worse since then.
I am a 65-year-old man and I have COPD. I have been a smoker for many years.
My breathing problems are present even at rest, not just during activity.
